findings.message: Weak SSL/TLS protocols should be avoided. Using deprecated SSL/TLS protocol versions (SSLv2, SSLv3, TLSv1.0, TLSv1.1) exposes connections to known vulnerabilities like POODLE, BEAST, and others. Use TLS 1.2 or TLS 1.3 for secure communications.
